targets.notes: Stated as an ambition to achieve net-zero energy and emissions across the full lifecycle/value chain, without a specified base year, target year, or quantified reduction pathway.
targets.title: Net-zero energy and emissions across the entire lifecycle of products

targets.notes: Goal/aspiration framed as sourcing renewable energy for operations, without a specified target year or quantified emissions reduction relative to a baseline.
targets.title: 100% renewable energy for operations
